title: After Schiller
content:
Knight, a true sister-love
     This heart retains;
    Ask me no other love,
     That way lie pains!

    Calm must I view thee come,
     Calm see thee go;
    Tale-telling tears of thine
     I must not know!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas Hardy delivers a powerful performance in "After Schiller"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
